_notes: Hand-curated by reading both differentials in full. Source (tk-soft) has 2 root constraints (1 error, 1 warning), 3 custom extensions (conditionDuration, conditionSeverityScore, diagnosisGroup), and category slices for problemList/encounterDiagnosis. Target (iit-proj) replaces all extensions with clinical-trial-specific ones (studyRelevance, protocolCriterion, adverseEventLink), adds 2 error-severity root constraints (iit-con-1, iit-con-2), makes verificationStatus mandatory, replaces category slices with inclusionCriteria/adverseEvent/comorbidity (all from iit-proj CodeSystem), removes code binding entirely, adds code.coding slicing with 3 optional slices (icd10, snomed, meddra), removes bodySite binding, changes reference targets to iit-proj profiles, makes onset[x] mandatory, bans recorder. clinicalStatus, severity, onset/abatement types, recordedDate, note are identical.

drifts.description: Root constraints removed in target: [tk-con-1 (error: Condition must have either a code or a category), tk-con-2 (warning: Resolved conditions should have an abatement date)]. These constraints no longer apply in target profile.

New constraint 'iit-con-1' added in target (severity: error): 'Research conditions must be coded with at least ICD-10 or SNOMED' â€” expression: code.coding.where(system='http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-10' or system='http://snomed.info/sct').exists(). Not present in source profile.

New constraint 'iit-con-2' added in target (severity: error): 'Inclusion criteria conditions must be verified' â€” expression: category.coding.where(code='inclusion-criteria').exists() implies verificationStatus.coding.where(code='confirmed').exists(). Not present in source profile.
Extension slice 'conditionDuration' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile.
Extension slice 'conditionSeverityScore' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile.
Extension slice 'diagnosisGroup' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile.

New extension slice 'studyRelevance' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Clinical trial extension for capturing the relevance of the condition to the study protocol. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'protocolCriterion' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Links the condition to a specific inclusion/exclusion criterion in the study protocol. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'adverseEventLink' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Links the condition to a related adverse event. Not present in source profile.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes verificationStatus mandatory.
Slice 'problemList' (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=problem-list-item from condition-category) removed in target profile.
Slice 'encounterDiagnosis' (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=encounter-diagnosis from condition-category) removed in target profile.

New MustSupport slice 'inclusionCriteria' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=inclusion-criteria from https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/condition-category). Not present in source profile.

New MustSupport slice 'adverseEvent' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=adverse-event from https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/condition-category). Not present in source profile.

New MustSupport slice 'comorbidity' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true, patternCodeableConcept=comorbidity from https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/CodeSystem/condition-category). Not present in source profile.
Binding removed in target: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code). Target has no explicit binding on code (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.
Slicing added in target on Condition.code.coding: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. Allows named coding slices for icd10, snomed, and meddra. Source had no slicing on code.coding.
New MustSupport slice 'icd10' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Optional ICD-10 coding slice for research conditions. Not present in source profile.
New MustSupport slice 'snomed' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Optional SNOMED CT coding slice. Not present in source profile.
New MustSupport slice 'meddra' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Optional MedDRA coding slice for adverse event classification. Not present in source profile.

Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraint relaxed: source defines code.coding.system as min=1 mustSupport=true; target (iit-proj) does not define general code.coding.system constraints, inheriting R4 base min=0 mustSupport=false, instead constraining within named slices icd10/snomed/meddra).

Cardinality changed: [1..1] -> [0..1] and MustSupport removed in target (constraint relaxed: source defines code.coding.code as min=1 mustSupport=true; target (iit-proj) does not define general code.coding.code constraints, inheriting R4 base min=0 mustSupport=false, instead constraining within named slices icd10/snomed/meddra).
Binding removed in target: Source uses extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/body-site). Target has no explicit binding on bodySite (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]. Target constrains to [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient].

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]. Target constrains to [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter]. Encounter cardinality is unchanged (min=0 in both).
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes onset mandatory for research conditions.

Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [0..0]. Element is completely banned in target. Source defined recorder as MustSupport with Reference(tk-soft/Practitioner). Target explicitly prohibits this element (max=0).
MustSupport removed in target. Source had recorder as MustSupport=true. Target sets max=0 and removes MustSupport.
